title: Xentara OAuth 2.0 Configuration File
description: The root of the Xentara OAuth 2.0 configuration file

scope.title: OAuth 2.0 scope
scope.description: scope strings for the OAuth 2.0 framework. These are returned in the WWW-Authenticate header, and must be present in valid authentication tokens.

items.title: OAuth 2.0 scope string
items.description: A single scope string in the OAuth 2.0 scope

issuers.title: Issuers
issuers.description: List of all recognized token issuers

iss.title: Issuer claim
iss.description: The value of the iss (issuer) claim used by the issuer

aud.title: Audience claim
aud.description: The value of the aud (audience) claim to be used for the issuer

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Additional roles (beyond "Everyone") to assign to clients authorized using this issuer

items.title: Role
items.description: A single role to assign to clients authorized using this issuer

authorizationClaims.title: Authorization claims
authorizationClaims.description: The authorization claims provided by the issuer

.*.title: Authorization claim
.*.description: A single authorization claim provided by the issuer

.*.title: Authorization claim roles
.*.description: The list of roles assigned to an authorization claim value

items.title: Authorization claim role
items.description: A single of roles assigned to an authorization claim value

verification.title: Token verification
verification.description: The verification mechanism used for the issuer

nonConformance.title: Non-Conformance options
nonConformance.description: Options to allow non-conforming behaviour for this issuer

allowGenericJwt.title: Allow "JWT" as token type
allowGenericJwt.description: Whether to allow a value of "JWT" for the "typ" (type) header parameter in addition to "at+jwt" or "application/at+jwt"

allowMissingTyp.title: Allow missing "typ" header parameter
allowMissingTyp.description: Whether to accept tokens without a "typ" (type) header property

allowMissingIat.title: Allow missing "iat" claim
allowMissingIat.description: Whether to accept tokens without an "iat" (assued at) claim

allowMissingExp.title: Allow missing "exp" claim
allowMissingExp.description: Whether to accept tokens without an "exp" (expiration time) claim

allowMissingSub.title: Allow missing "sub" claim
allowMissingSub.description: Whether to accept tokens without a "sub" (subject) claim

allowMissingClientId.title: Allow missing "client_id" claim
allowMissingClientId.description: Whether to accept tokens without a "client_id" (client identifier) claim

allowMissingJti.title: Allow missing "jti" claim
allowMissingJti.description: Whether to accept tokens without a "jti" (JWT ID) claim
